WWE Title History

Pro Wrestling Title History

Here you find the complete Title History for all Championships in WWE history, including all active titles on Raw, SmackDown and NXT, as well as all classic and retired championships defended in World Wrestling Entertainment/Federation.

Clicking on each championship brings you to its full details, the Belt Design changes through the years, and the full list of Title Reigns, along with reign durations, statistics, and more information.

WWE Main Roster: Active Championships

Undisputed WWE Championship

1963 - Present
CM Punk

World Heavyweight Championship

2023 - Present
Roman Reigns

WWE Intercontinental Championship

1979 - Present
Penta

WWE United States Championship

1975 - Present
Trick Williams

WWE Tag Team Championship

2016 - Present
Damian Priest & R-Truth

World Tag Team Championship

2002 - Present
Bron Breakker & Austin Theory

WWE Women's Championship

2016 - Present
Rhea Ripley

Women's World Championship

2016 - Present
Liv Morgan

WWE Women's Intercontinental Championship

2024 - Present
Sol Ruca

WWE Women's United States Championship

2024 - Present
Tiffany Stratton

WWE Women's Tag Team Championship

2018 - Present
Brie Bella & Paige

WWE Developmental: Active Championships

NXT Championship

2012 - Present
Tony D'Angelo

NXT North American Championship

2018 - Present
Myles Borne

NXT Tag Team Championship

2013 - Present
Brad Baylor & Ricky Smokes

NXT Women's Championship

2013 - Present
Kendal Grey

NXT Women's North American Championship

2024 - Present
Zaria

WWE Speed Championship

2024 - Present
Lexis King

WWE Women's Speed Championship

2024 - Present
Wren Sinclair

WWE Evolve Championship

2012 - Present
Aaron Rourke

WWE Evolve Women's Championship

2025 - Present
Nikkita Lyons

WWE ID Championship

2025 - Present
Max Abrams

WWE ID Women's Championship

2025 - Present
Laynie Luck

WWE: Retired Championships

NXT Heritage Cup

2020 - 2025

WWE Universal Championship

2016 - 2024

NXT Women's Tag Team Championship

2021 - 2023

WWE 24/7 Championship

2019 - 2022

NXT UK Women's Championship

2018 - 2022

NXT UK Tag Team Championship

2018 - 2022

WWE / NXT United Kingdom Championship

2016 - 2022

WWE / NXT Cruiserweight Championship

2016 - 2022

Million Dollar Championship

1989 - 2021

WWE Divas Championship

2008 - 2016

World Heavyweight Championship ('02-'13)

2002 - 2013

WWE Women's Championship ('56-'10)

1956 - 2010

World Tag Team Championship ('71-'10)

1971 - 2010

ECW World Heavyweight Championship

1992 - 2010

WCW / WWE Cruiserweight Championship

1996 - 2007

WWF Hardcore Championship

1998 - 2002

WWF European Championship

1997 - 2002

WWF Light Heavyweight Championship

1981 - 2002

WCW World Heavyweight Championship

1991 - 2001

WCW World Tag Team Championship

1975 - 2001

WWF World Martial Arts Heavyweight Championship

1978 - 1989

WWF Women's Tag Team Championship

1983 - 1989

WWF International Heavyweight Championship

1959 - 1985

WWF Junior Heavyweight Championship

1978 - 1985

WWWF International Tag Team Championship

1969 - 1985

NWF North American Heavyweight Championship

1968 - 1981

WWF North American Heavyweight Championship

1979 - 1981

WWWF United States Heavyweight Championship

1960 - 1976

NWA/WWWF United States Tag Team Championship (Northeast)

1958 - 1967

NWA United States Television Championship (Capitol Version)

1958 - 1962

NWA World Tag Team Championship (Capitol version)

1957 - 1961
